claim: PGGT1B is a proposal-only stimulated primary CD4+ activation-transcriptome hypothesis. Comparable independent replication and donor or batch specificity remain open.
subject: PGGT1B

evidence.fact: PGGT1B has on-target knockdown and high Stim8hr reach
public PGGT1B comparators use non-matching readouts

verifier.name: frozen-data tools
verifier.method: every fact is a deterministic lookup against a released table; the agent cannot assert ungated biology

conditions: It has no annotated regulon and is not a known TF, yet its knockdown reshapes thousands of genes only upon stimulation and only in T cells, pointing to an under-appreciated, likely prenylation-mediated regulatory role rather than a housekeeping or canonical T-cell function.
a hypothesis to test, not an established result
